response.original_title: Official SUPPORT 1-870-768-0250: Kraken Wallet Withdrawal Issue
response.overview: Dial for Direct help (+)1-(870 768 0250 If you are facing withdrawal restrictions, there are several steps you can take: ☎️ (Direct help (+)1-(870 768 0250)(US/Canada) Complete Full Verification Ensure your Kraken account is fully verified. This includes submitting all required ☎️ (Direct help (+)1-(870 768 0250)(US/Canada) documents and waiting for approval. Higher verification tiers usually unlock higher limits.
